description_long: This object is a classic electric rice cooker with a rounded, slightly tapered body finished in a deep brown color. The cooker features a metallic, dome-shaped removable lid with a central knob for easy lifting. Two black side handles are attached to the main body, providing a secure grip for carrying. At the front, there is a small, rectangular control panel with a single switch or button, likely for power or cooking mode selection. The base of the cooker is supported by four small feet, elevating it slightly above the surface. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on durability and ease of use, typical for kitchen appliances found in urban households or communal spaces.
description: A brown electric rice cooker with a metallic dome lid, black side handles, and a front control panel. The design is sturdy and practical, suitable for everyday urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the metallic lid, both black handles, and the central control panel at the base.
description_view_1: Side-rear view highlighting one black handle and the back portion of the cooker, with the control panel partially obscured.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the metallic lid and both black handles, with no control panel visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side-rear view similar to view 1, showing the other handle and the back, with the control panel partially visible.
attribute_control_panel_layout: A single rectangular control panel at the front base with one button or switch, no visible labels, icons, or indicator lights.
attribute_lid_design: Removable, dome-shaped metallic lid with a central knob handle, no visible hinges, locks, vents, or windows.
attribute_handle_type: Two fixed, rectangular black plastic handles attached to opposite sides of the main body.
